name: Chile Rellenos
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the seeds from the roasted chiles.
2. Cut each chili in half lengthwise and scoop out the seeds and membrane, leaving a cavity.
3. Fill each cavity with about 1 tablespoon of cheese.
4. Dip the filled chiles back into the melted cheese to coat them evenly.
5. Place the stuffed chiles on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
6. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for about 15 minutes or until golden brown and crispy.
7. Turn off the oven when finished cooking.
8. Serve hot with your desired accompaniment.
